enemies.drop: 3x Wizard Stone, 3x Wizard Stone, Star Fragment, Star Fragment
enemies.scan: Hard to damage due to the steel armor. Doesn't use magic, but its sword causes significant damage.

enemies.name: Jelleye
enemies.mug: Healing Water, Healing Water, 2x Healing Water, 2x Healing Water
enemies.drop: M-Stone Piece, 2 M-Stone Piece, 3x M-Stone Piece, 4x M-Stone Piece
enemies.scan: Changes tactics as the battle progresses. Its magic also changes from fire to ice, to thunder, etc. [Fly Monster] [Physical Defense Morph] [Magic Defense Morph] [Complete Defense Morph]

enemies.name: Jumbo Cactuar
enemies.mug: 3x Cactus Thorn, 3x Cactus Thorn, 4x Cactus Thorn, 4x Cactus Thorn
enemies.drop: Gaea's Ring, Gaea's Ring, Gaea's Ring, Gaea's Ring
enemies.scan: Some Cactuars live long lives and grow huge. This Jumbo Cactuar is one of those.

enemies.name: Krysta
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Elem Guard, Elem Guard, Elem Guard, Elem Guard
enemies.scan: Born of a jewel in Ultimecia's Castle. Responds quickly to attacks. Counter-attacks immediately. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Left Orb
enemies.mug: Mag Up, 2x Mag Up, 3x Mag Up, 4x Mag Up
enemies.drop: none
enemies.scan: NORG's support system with auto-recover functions that restore any damage. Uses attack magic.

enemies.name: Left Probe
enemies.mug: 2x Vit Up, 2x Vit Up, 4x Vit Up, 4x Vit Up
enemies.drop: none
enemies.scan: Mobile Type 8's left shoulder. Acts on its own as a machine. Has auto-recovery and attack functions. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Lefty
enemies.mug: Life Ring, Life Ring, Life Ring, Life Ring
enemies.drop: 3x M-Stone Piece, 4x M-Stone Piece, Life Ring, Life Ring
enemies.scan: A large left hand protruding from the earth. Sometimes cures party members with status abnormalities.

enemies.name: Malboro
enemies.mug: Malboro Tentacle,Malboro Tentacle,2xMalboro Tentacle,2xMalboro Tentacle
enemies.drop: Malboro Tentacle, 2x Curse Spike, 3x Curse Spike, 4x Curse Spike
enemies.scan: Uses Bad Breath, which causes all status abnormalities. Be ready with status defenses before fighting.

enemies.name: Mesmerize
enemies.mug: Mesmerize Blade, Mesmerize Blade, Mesmerize Blade, Mesmerize Blade
enemies.drop: Life Ring, Mesmerize Blade, 2x Healing Water, 3x Healing Water
enemies.scan: Has a large blade for a horn. This blade has a healing effect when used as an item or to make magic.

enemies.name: Minotaur
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: 8x G-Returner, 8x G-Returner, 8x G-Returner, 8x G-Returner
enemies.scan: Sacred's older brother. This Earth GF has healing ability, as long as his feet are on the ground.

enemies.name: Mobile Type 8
enemies.mug: 2x Laser Cannon, 2x Laser Cannon, 3x Laser Cannon, 4x Laser Cannon
enemies.drop: Laser Cannon, 2x Laser Cannon, 3x Laser Cannon, 4x Laser Cannon
enemies.scan: Its beam and laser attacks go far beyond the damage of any modern weapons. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Norg
enemies.mug: Circlet, Circlet, Circlet, Circlet
enemies.drop: 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone
enemies.scan: Master of Balamb Garden. Opposes Headmaster Cid in trying to control Balamb Garden.

enemies.name: Ochu
enemies.mug: 2x Ochu Tentacle, 2x Ochu Tentacle, 2x Ochu Tentacle, 2x Ochu Tentacle
enemies.drop: 2x Magic Stone, Ochu Tentacle, 3x Magic Stone, 2x Ochu Tentacle
enemies.scan: Likes to live in forests. Attacks with its tentacles and also uses status-changing attacks.

enemies.name: Odin
enemies.mug: Luck-J Scroll, Luck-J Scroll, Luck-J Scroll, Luck-J Scroll
enemies.drop: 8x G-Mega-Potion, 8x G-Mega-Potion, 8x G-Mega-Potion, 8x G-Mega-Potion
enemies.scan: A legendary GF that sleeps in a dungeon. Zantetsuken cuts anything that stands in its way.

enemies.name: Oilboyle
enemies.mug: 4x Fuel, 4x Fuel, 4x Fuel, 4x Fuel
enemies.drop: 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone
enemies.scan: This creature lives underground. Its slimy body is full of oil. Attacks by spitting oil.

enemies.name: Omega Weapon
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Three Stars, Three Stars, Three Stars, Three Stars
enemies.scan: Stronger than Ultima Weapon, Omega Weapon is the strongest monster. It is bad luck to run into this monster.

enemies.name: Paratrooper
enemies.mug: Remedy, Remedy, Remedy, Remedy
enemies.drop: Potion, Phoenix Down, Remedy, Remedy
enemies.scan: Soldier assigned to Galbadia Garden. Specializes in sneak attacks. Much stronger than regular soldiers.

enemies.name: Propagator
enemies.mug: 6x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 10x Wizard Stone, 12x Wizard Stone
enemies.drop: SS, DS, FS, AS; PS, HS, MS, DS; AS, US, US, US; DS, US, US, US*4
enemies.scan: A monster living in the spaceship Ragnarok. Very violent in nature, it attacks anything that moves within the ship.

enemies.name: Raldo
enemies.mug: 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone, 8x Wizard Stone
enemies.drop: 4x Wizard Stone, 4x Wizard Stone, 4x Wizard Stone, 4x Wizard Stone
enemies.scan: May look slow due to its stone-like body, but it is actually quite fast. May appear in numbers.

enemies.name: Red Bat
enemies.mug: Vampire Fang, Vampire Fang, Vampire Fang, Vampire Fang
enemies.drop: M-Stone Piece, M-Stone Piece, Vampire Fang, Vampire Fang
enemies.scan: A type of bat with a huge mouth. Lurks in dark places. Dives quickly from the air to bite its target. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Right Orb
enemies.mug: Spr Up, 2x Spr Up, 3x Spr Up, 4x Spr Up
enemies.drop: none
enemies.scan: NORG's support system with auto-recover functions that restore any damage. Uses status-changing attacks.

enemies.name: Right Probe
enemies.mug: 2x Str Up, 2x Str Up, 4x Str Up, 4x Str Up
enemies.drop: none
enemies.scan: Mobile Type 8's right shoulder. Acts on its own as a machine. Has auto-recovery and attack functions. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Righty
enemies.mug: 4x Magic Stone, 4x Magic Stone, 4x Magic Stone, 4x Magic Stone
enemies.drop: 3x M-Stone Piece, 4x M-Stone Piece, 6x M-Stone Piece, Rune Armlet
enemies.scan: A large right hand protruding from the earth. Can't use magic. Uses its strength to attack with force.

enemies.name: Rinoa
enemies.mug: 8x Megalixir, 8x Megalixir, 8x Megalixir, 8x Megalixir
enemies.drop: none
enemies.scan: Rinoa is being junctioned by Adel. Immobile, because Adel is absorbing her powers. Can be released by defeating Adel.

enemies.name: Ruby Dragon
enemies.mug: Inferno Fang, Inferno Fang, 2x Inferno Fang, 2x Inferno Fang
enemies.drop: Inferno Fang, 2x Inferno Fang, 2x Fury Fragment, Star Fragment
enemies.scan: Strong and smart dragon. If enemies are using Reflect, it casts Reflect on itself to mirror the attack.

enemies.name: Sam08g
enemies.mug: Running Fire, Running Fire, Running Fire, Running Fire
enemies.drop: 2x M-Stone Piece, Running Fire, Dragon Fin, Dragon Fang
enemies.scan: A living weapon made by Galbadia. Carries a 155mm cannon on both shoulders and a 60mm Vulcan cannon in its mouth.

enemies.name: Slapper
enemies.mug: 2x Hi-Potion, 2x Hi-Potion, 2x Hi-Potion, 2x Hi-Potion
enemies.drop: Hi-Potion, Hi-Potion, 2x Hi-Potion, 2x Hi-Potion
enemies.scan: A member of Galbadia Garden's demi-human ice-hockey club. Attacks with speed and team work.

enemies.name: Snow Lion
enemies.mug: Healing Mail, Healing Mail, 2x Healing Mail, 2x Healing Mail
enemies.drop: 2x North Wind, 2x North Wind, 2x Healing Mail, 2x Healing Mail
enemies.scan: Lives in the northern snow fields. Takes time to defeat because of its high HP. Uses Ice Breath when angry.

enemies.name: Thrustaevis
enemies.mug: Shear Feather, 2x Shear Feather, Windmill, Windmill
enemies.drop: Shear Feather, Shear Feather, 2x M-Stone Piece, Windmill
enemies.scan: A monster on the Galbadia continent. Usually swoops down to attack enemies, but also bites and causes wind gusts when in danger. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Tiamat
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Status Guard, Status Guard, Status Guard, Status Guard
enemies.scan: Used to be a GF. Became a monster under Ultimecia's power. Its Dark Flare destroys all enemies. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Tonberry
enemies.mug: Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife
enemies.drop: Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife, Chef's Knife
enemies.scan: Mysterious being living in dungeons. Walks slowly towards the enemy and kills that enemy with the Chef's Knife.

enemies.name: Tonberry King
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Royal Crown, Royal Crown, Royal Crown, Royal Crown
enemies.scan: The king of the Tonberries. Appears to seek revenge for all defeated Tonberries.

enemies.name: Torama
enemies.mug: Regen Ring, Regen Ring, Regen Ring, Regen Ring
enemies.drop: 2x Wizard Stone, 2x Wizard Stone, 2x Life Ring, 2x Life Ring
enemies.scan: Uses multiple magic attacks while sitting down. Even more powerful when it stands up to use its Blaster attacks.

enemies.name: Trauma
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Elem Atk, Elem Atk, Elem Atk, Elem Atk
enemies.scan: Ultimecia gave partial life to this weapon of the future. Pulse Cannon destroys any enemies in its way. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Tri-Face
enemies.mug: Curse Spike, Curse Spike, 2x Curse Spike, 2x Curse Spike
enemies.drop: 3x Poison Powder, 2x Dead Spirit, 2x Curse Spike, 2x Curse Spike
enemies.scan: A monster with 3 heads. The 2 heads on the side are not real, but they bite and spit poison as if they were.

enemies.name: Tri-Point
enemies.mug: has nothing
enemies.drop: Rocket Engine, Rocket Engine, Rocket Engine, Rocket Engine
enemies.scan: A living weapon Ultimecia made out of a dragon. Fire or ice are its weak points, but they change when attacked. [Fly Monster]

enemies.name: Turtapod
enemies.mug: 2x Wizard Stone, 2x Wizard Stone, 2x Wizard Stone, 2x Wizard Stone
enemies.drop: Wizard Stone, Wizard Stone, Life Ring, Life Ring
enemies.scan: Attacks with magic and sharp claws. When attacked, it may change defense mode in order to protect itself from damage.

enemies.name: T-Rexaur
enemies.mug: Dino Bone, Dino Bone, Dino Bone, 2x Dino Bone
enemies.drop: Dino Bone, 8x M-Stone Piece, 4x Magic Stone, 2x Dino Bone
enemies.scan: Alive since the beginning of time, its power and HP are very high. It's better to run if you encounter one.

enemies.name: Ultima Weapon
enemies.mug: Three Stars, Three Stars, Three Stars, Three Stars
enemies.drop: 100x Ultima Stone,100x Ultima Stone,100x Ultima Stone,100x Ultima Stone
enemies.scan: The strongest, ultimate monster. It's said to be impossible to defeat.

enemies.name: Vysage
enemies.mug: Lightweight, Lightweight, Lightweight, Lightweight
enemies.drop: 6x M-Stone Piece, 2x Lightweight, 6x M-Stone Piece, 6x M-Stone Piece
enemies.scan: A monster shaped like a face. Uses support magic and special attacks when attacking with Righty and Lefty together.

enemies.name: Wendigo
enemies.mug: Steel Pipe, Steel Pipe, Steel Pipe, Steel Pipe
enemies.drop: Steel Orb, Steel Pipe, Steel Pipe, Steel Orb
enemies.scan: A strong monster, but not good at using magic. Uses powerful physical attacks relying on its strength instead.

enemies.name: Ifrit
enemies.drop: 3x–6x G-Returner
enemies.scan: Fire Cavern boss. GF junction target. Immune to Fire, weak to Ice. Fixed Lv 6.

enemies.name: Biggs
enemies.mug: 3x Elixir
enemies.drop: 2x Elixir
enemies.scan: Galbadian soldier. Fought alongside Wedge in Dollet. Mug for Elixirs.

enemies.name: Wedge
enemies.mug: 3x Cottage
enemies.drop: 2x Cottage
enemies.scan: Galbadian soldier. Fought alongside Biggs in Dollet. Mug for Cottages.

enemies.name: X-ATM092
enemies.mug: 2x Elixir
enemies.drop: Power Wrist / Orihalcon / Hypno Crown / Force Armlet (on destruction)
enemies.scan: Spider-type Galbadian war machine. Pursues party in Dollet. Regenerates HP; must be destroyed at end of escape.

enemies.name: Seifer (Deling City)
enemies.mug: Hero (6.25% chance)
enemies.scan: Rival SeeD turned sorceress knight. Solo fight before Edea in Deling City parade. Draw Life for stocking.

enemies.name: Edea (Deling City)
enemies.mug: Elixir
enemies.scan: Sorceress possessed by Ultimecia. First major boss. Casts Limit Break Ice Strike at low HP. No GF available here.

enemies.name: BGH251F2 (Missile Base)
enemies.scan: Galbadian mobile battle fortress. Missile Base boss. AP 0, no drops. Use Thunder.

enemies.name: NORG Pod
enemies.scan: Protective shell surrounding NORG. Fixed HP 2000. No attacks. Destroy both orbs to expose NORG.

enemies.name: BGH251F2 (FH)
enemies.mug: Adamantine
enemies.drop: 8x Running Fire / 8x Missile
enemies.scan: Second encounter with Galbadian battle fortress at Fishermans Horizon. Mug for Adamantine.

enemies.name: Raijin (solo)
enemies.mug: 2x Str Up
enemies.drop: Str Up
enemies.scan: Seifer's ally. Solo fight in Balamb with 2x G-Soldier. Will not attack female-only parties.

enemies.name: Fujin
enemies.mug: Megalixir
enemies.drop: Megalixir + Combat King 002
enemies.scan: Seifer's ally. Fought with Raijin in Balamb. Draw Pandemona GF here if missed. Drop: Combat King 002.

enemies.name: Raijin (with Fujin)
enemies.mug: 2x Str Up
enemies.drop: Str Up
enemies.scan: Fought alongside Fujin in Balamb. Same stats as solo fight. Gains Raijin Special attack.

enemies.name: Seifer (Gardens)
enemies.mug: 8x Mega Phoenix
enemies.drop: 8x Mega-Potion
enemies.scan: Battle of the Gardens solo fight. Stronger than before; uses Fire Cross limit break.

enemies.name: Seifer (with Edea)
enemies.mug: Hero / Holy War
enemies.drop: Hero / Holy War
enemies.scan: Tag-team fight with Edea at Galbadia Garden. AP 0 for this fight. Mug/Drop: Hero or Holy War.

enemies.name: Edea (Galbadia Garden)
enemies.mug: Royal Crown
enemies.drop: Force Armlet
enemies.scan: Second Edea fight. Draw Alexander GF here — last reliable chance until Catoblepas.

enemies.name: Red Giant
enemies.drop: Diamond Armor
enemies.scan: Ultimecia Castle dungeon boss. Fixed HP 30000. Extreme Vit/Spr — junction Meltdown or use Demi. Draw Pandemona if missed.

enemies.name: Sphinxaur
enemies.mug: Elixir
enemies.scan: Ultimecia Castle entrance area boss. Fixed HP 10000. AP 0. Transforms into Sphinxara when HP depleted.

enemies.name: Sphinxara
enemies.drop: Megalixir
enemies.scan: Second phase of Sphinxaur. Fixed HP 10000. AP 30. Uses Lvl 5 Death and other level-based attacks.

enemies.name: Ultimecia (form 1)
enemies.scan: Final boss first form. Casts Apocalypse and Hell's Judgment. No GF junctions — party must use their own.

enemies.name: Ultimecia (Griever)
enemies.scan: Ultimecia merged with Griever. Third final boss form. Uses Shockwave Pulsar. Difficult to stop.

enemies.name: Ultimecia (final)
enemies.scan: True final boss main body. Uses Great Attractor and Sorceress combo attacks. Defeat to end game.

enemies.name: Ultimecia (appendage)
enemies.scan: Lower appendage of final Ultimecia. Draws and casts Apocalypse against the party. Does not act independently.
